metadata.title: Amigurumi Pattern & Handmade Store
metadata.description: A secure bilingual foundation for handmade goods and crochet patterns.

catalog.title: Shop crochet goods
catalog.intro: Browse downloadable patterns and finished handmade pieces available in your market.
catalog.emptyBody: Try changing your search or filters.

product.digitalWarning: Digital pattern, not a finished item
product.unavailableBody: This product is published, but it cannot be purchased in your active market.

home.title: Handmade crochet patterns and keepsakes
home.intro: A calm bilingual foundation for a future handmade storefront serving Vietnam and international customers.
home.localizedBody: Public pages use explicit Vietnamese and English routes with equivalent language switching.
home.secureBody: Account and admin access will build on server-side checks and database-owned roles.
home.studioBody: The visual system keeps handmade character restrained, readable, and trustworthy.

auth.genericError: We could not complete that request. Check the details and try again.

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.intro: Use your email and password to enter your account.

register.title: Create account
register.intro: Create an account for future order history and secure access.
register.successBody: If confirmation is required, use the link we sent to finish setting up your account.

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.intro: Enter your email and we will send reset instructions if the account exists.
forgotPassword.successBody: If that email can receive account mail, reset instructions will arrive shortly.

resetPassword.title: Choose a new password
resetPassword.intro: Enter a new password after opening a valid recovery link.
resetPassword.successBody: Your password was updated. You can continue with your account.
resetPassword.invalidRecovery: This recovery link is no longer valid. Request a new password reset link.

account.title: Account
account.intro: Your Phase 1 account boundary is active.

accessDenied.heading: This order cannot be opened
accessDenied.body: The link is invalid, expired, or you do not have access.

fulfillment.lockedBody: PDF access and shipping work begin only after the full order is confirmed paid.
fulfillment.eligibleBody: Payment is confirmed. This order is now eligible for the next fulfillment step.

downloads.title: Pattern downloads
downloads.readyBody: Paid PDF patterns can be requested from this order page. Each request creates a short-lived private link.
downloads.lockedBody: Download access appears here after the full order is confirmed paid.
downloads.expiredBody: If an email link expired, request a fresh link from this order page after payment is confirmed.

awaiting_payment.heading: Awaiting payment
awaiting_payment.body: Review the exact total and complete payment before the reservation deadline.
awaiting_payment.vietqrBody: Transfer the exact VND amount with the shown reference before the deadline. The seller must verify the bank transfer before this order can be paid.

verifying_payment.heading: Verifying payment
verifying_payment.body: PayPal returned you to the store. We are verifying the payment before updating your order.
verifying_payment.vietqrBody: The bank transfer is under seller review. PDF access and shipping remain locked until the full order is confirmed paid.

paid.heading: Payment confirmed
paid.body: The full order payment has been confirmed.

failed.heading: Payment failed
failed.body: This order cannot be retried. Start a new checkout to recalculate current stock and prices.

cancelled.heading: Payment cancelled
cancelled.body: Payment was cancelled and reserved items are no longer held for this order.

rejected.heading: Bank transfer rejected
rejected.body: The payment evidence was not accepted because the amount or reference did not match. The paid gate stays closed and this order cannot be retried.

expired.heading: Payment window expired
expired.body: The reservation deadline passed and items are no longer held for this order.
expired.vietqrBody: The VietQR transfer window expired. This order cannot be paid or fulfilled; start a new checkout for current stock and prices.

partially_refunded.heading: Partially refunded
partially_refunded.body: A partial refund is recorded for this order. No new customer action is available here.

refunded.heading: Refunded
refunded.body: This order has been refunded. No new customer action is available here.

review_required.heading: Payment needs review
review_required.body: We are reviewing verified payment facts before changing the order status.
review_required.vietqrBody: The seller is checking the bank transfer details before changing the order status.

paypal.unavailable: PayPal is not available for this order right now.

vietqr.title: Transfer the exact amount and reference
vietqr.body: The order is confirmed only after the seller checks the bank account. Do not change the amount or transfer reference.
vietqr.unavailable: VietQR instructions are not available for this order right now.

orders.title: Order history
orders.error: Order history could not be loaded.

patterns.title: Pattern library
patterns.empty: Paid PDF patterns will appear here after payment is confirmed.
patterns.error: Pattern library could not be loaded.
